title: Watson Design System from Docplanner
content: Watson from Directories: Components: Watson Design System enhances user experiences across Docplanner platform. Built on the Docplanner Design Language, Watson includes working code, design tools, resources, and human interface guidelines. Prioritizing accessibility and usability, Docplanner Design System ensures seamless interactions for all users. This centralized repository of design assets and documentation fosters collaboration and consistency across projects. Watson is supported by a vibrant community of contributors, ensuring consistent and high-quality user experiences across all Docplanner platforms. Color System Component overview Repository Icons Layout Patterns Responsive Spacing Tokens Typography Accordion Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Button group Cards Checkbox Combobox Data table Date picker Divider Empty state Icon Link Menus Modal Pagination Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Select Sidebar Snackbar Switch Tabs Text area Text field Tooltip
